Oh well. I guess the patch will never look 100% here, as bug-followup
does not seem to look quoted-printable emails, and the patch has UTF-8
characters in it.

I have uploaded it to
http://people.profusion.mobi/~kubo/freebsd/bash-completion-fix-avahi-daemon.patch
